privileged_info_summary: The task asks to create a CountryDashboard materialized view in OrientDB's demodb database with 4 properties (CountryName STRING, HotelCount INTEGER, AvgHotelStars DOUBLE, RestaurantCount INTEGER) and a UNIQUE index on CountryName. The data source is synthetic: a Python seed script (seed_demodb.py) generates 15 hotel and 11 restaurant records across 11 countries with real establishment names. The minimum record requirement is 5; the actual data will provide 11 countries, exceeding this. Expected results: Italy (3 hotels avg 4.67 stars), Germany (2 hotels avg 4.5 stars), France (2 hotels avg 4.5 stars), and 8 other countries with 1 hotel each (all 5 stars), each country having 1 restaurant except Italy which has 1.
